events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still rocking! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV's 45th Birthday
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever by launching with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. What was the first music video that truly blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring hits like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. Still sounds as fresh as ever. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music and Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. Which legendary performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, on the 49th anniversary of his passing. His music lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Legendary rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996. This marks 30 years since the shooting.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years since the tragic shooting of Tupac Shakur. A voice that defined a generation, gone too soon. His impact on music is undeniable.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who passed away 56 years ago. His guitar work still sounds like it's from the future.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969, in the UK.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs... pure magic. What's your go-to track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' legendary frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking as powerfully as ever. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic single 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971, in the US.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace that resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: The first iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, and it was released on November 10, 2001.

angles.name: iPod's 25th Birthday
angles.copy: Remember when you could fit '1,000 songs in your pocket'? The first iPod turns 25 this month, revolutionising how we listened to music. Did you have one?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From Connery to Craig, which 007 film or theme tune is your absolute favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire generations worldwide.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British actor, comedian, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy legend.
